SEARCH
Package com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure

Class InMemoryTransactionLog

java.lang.Object
com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
@Repository public class InMemoryTransactionLog extends Object
Thread-safe in-memory transaction log for a participant.

In a production fault-tolerant implementation this would be backed by a durable store (file, database). For simulation purposes an in-memory map suffices.

    List<LogEntry>
    findAllWithPhase(TransactionStatus phase)
    Returns all log entries whose phase matches the given status.
    Optional<String>
    getLatestCommittedValue()
    Returns the value from the most recently committed transaction, or empty if no committed transaction has been recorded yet.

    read(UUID transactionId)
    Retrieves the last known log entry for a transaction.

    Returns the total number of entries in the log.

    • InMemoryTransactionLog

      public InMemoryTransactionLog()

  • Method Details

    • write

      public void write(LogEntry entry)
      Writes or overwrites the log entry for the given transaction.
      Parameters:
      entry - the entry to persist.

    • read

      public Optional<LogEntry> read(UUID transactionId)
      Retrieves the last known log entry for a transaction.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - the transaction to look up.
      Returns:
      the entry wrapped in Optional, or empty if not found.

    • updatePhase

      public void updatePhase(UUID transactionId, TransactionStatus phase)
      Updates the phase of an existing log entry.
      Parameters:
      transactionId - the transaction whose phase is being updated.
      phase - the new phase.

    • findAllWithPhase

      public List<LogEntry> findAllWithPhase(TransactionStatus phase)
      Returns all log entries whose phase matches the given status.
      Parameters:
      phase - the phase to filter by.
      Returns:
      snapshot list of matching entries.

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the total number of entries in the log.
      Returns:
      entry count.

    • getLatestCommittedValue

      public Optional<String> getLatestCommittedValue()
      Returns the value from the most recently committed transaction, or empty if no committed transaction has been recorded yet.
      Returns:
      the latest committed value wrapped in an Optional.
